questions.subject: Polity
questions.prompt: In the institutional architecture of Mission Karmayogi, which of the following entities is specifically responsible for the execution and management of the iGOT Karmayogi platform?
questions.explanation: While the CBC provides functional supervision and policy recommendations, the actual implementation and execution of the iGOT Karmayogi platform are handled by 'Karmayogi Bharat', which is a Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV) established for this purpose.
questions.takeaway: Mission Karmayogi uses a tiered structure where the CBC handles planning/supervision and an SPV (Karmayogi Bharat) handles digital implementation.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: iGOT Karmayogi ... Implementation: Executed by Karmayogi Bharat (SPV).

questions.subject: Polity
questions.prompt: The Capacity Building Commission (CBC) aims to evolve a 'de-siloed' approach to civil service training. Which of the following activities directly supports this objective?

options.text: Conducting individual performance appraisals for all civil servants.
Creating shared learning resources and exercising functional supervision over various training institutions.
Directly managing the recruitment process for the Central Training Institutes.
Acting as a disciplinary body for civil servants who fail to complete mandatory training.

questions.explanation: A 'de-siloed' approach implies breaking down barriers between different departments and institutes. By creating shared learning resources and exercising functional supervision across different training institutions, the CBC ensures a uniform and collaborative approach to capacity building.
questions.takeaway: The CBC's role is to harmonize training standards across different silos of the government through shared resources and supervision.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: Key Functions: ... Exercising functional supervision over Training Institutions and creating shared learning resources ... Evolving a harmonious, de-siloed approach to capacity building initiatives.
